title: thelypteris ochthodes
intro: Thelypteris ochthodes, also known as the Black Spleenwort, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, helping to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Thelypteris ochthodes include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris ochthodes include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, taken as capsules, or applied topically to the affected area.
